description: Benchmark tests for subagent-driver skill - Core SDD executor managing Fresh Subagent startup, isolation levels, and inter-task code review

evals.name: fresh-subagent-launch
evals.prompt: 启动一个新的 Fresh Subagent 来执行 TASK-003: 实现用户登录 API。确保 subagent 以干净的上下文启动。

assertions.name: launches_fresh_context
assertions.description: Should launch subagent with fresh/clean context

assertions.name: assigns_correct_task
assertions.description: Should assign TASK-003 to the new subagent

assertions.name: isolates_from_parent_context
assertions.description: Should ensure subagent does not inherit parent conversation context
assertions.check: output.includes('isolat') || output.includes('隔离') || output.includes('context') || output.includes('上下文')

evals.name: isolation-level-selection
evals.prompt: 为以下三个任务选择正确的隔离级别: 1) 修复 typo（无代码变更）; 2) 添加新功能（新分支）; 3) 大型重构（需要 worktree）

assertions.name: selects_none_for_trivial
assertions.description: Should select no isolation for trivial typo fixes
assertions.check: output.includes('none') || output.includes('无隔离') || output.includes('直接') || output.includes('trivial')

assertions.name: selects_branch_for_feature
assertions.description: Should select branch isolation for new features

assertions.name: selects_worktree_for_refactor
assertions.description: Should select worktree isolation for large refactors

evals.name: inter-task-review
evals.prompt: TASK-002 已完成，TASK-003 依赖于 TASK-002 的输出。在 TASK-003 开始前，subagent-driver 应触发任务间代码评审。

assertions.name: triggers_code_review
assertions.description: Should trigger code review before starting dependent task
assertions.check: output.includes('review') || output.includes('评审') || output.includes('code-review') || output.includes('检查')

assertions.name: invokes_reviewer_agent
assertions.description: Should invoke code-reviewer agent for the review

assertions.name: blocks_next_task_pending_review
assertions.description: Should block TASK-003 until review is complete
assertions.check: output.includes('block') || output.includes('wait') || output.includes('等待') || output.includes('完成后')

evals.name: context-handoff
evals.prompt: 将 TASK-004 的上下文传递给新的 subagent。上下文应该最小化，只包含任务执行所必需的信息。

assertions.name: includes_task_spec
assertions.description: Should include the task specification in handoff
assertions.check: output.includes('spec') || output.includes('规范') || output.includes('任务说明') || output.includes('TASK-004')

assertions.name: minimizes_context_size
assertions.description: Should only pass minimal required context, not full conversation history
assertions.check: output.includes('minimal') || output.includes('最小') || output.includes('必要') || output.includes('relevant')

assertions.name: includes_dependency_outputs
assertions.description: Should include outputs from dependency tasks

evals.name: task-completion-verification
evals.prompt: Subagent 声称已完成 TASK-005: 开发前端登录页面。验证任务是否真正完成（包括所有交付物和验收标准）。

assertions.name: checks_deliverables
assertions.description: Should verify all expected deliverables exist
assertions.check: output.includes('deliver') || output.includes('交付') || output.includes('LoginForm') || output.includes('文件')

assertions.name: validates_acceptance_criteria
assertions.check: output.includes('验收') || output.includes('acceptance') || output.includes('criteria') || output.includes('标准')

assertions.name: reports_completion_status
assertions.description: Should report a clear pass/fail completion status
assertions.check: output.includes('完成') || output.includes('complete') || output.includes('PASS') || output.includes('通过')
